
# Response Threshold Policy Review

This review uses the saved LightGBM validation and test predictions in `/Users/anastasiia.m/Documents/My projects/slot-response-modeling-clean/slot-response-production_handoff/runtime/response_modeling/models/lightgbm`. The label definition is unchanged: `response_label_positive_3d` remains the positive observed 3-day response flag.

## Threshold Policy

- Current threshold before this refinement: `0.35`
- Previous selection basis: validation `best_f1`
- Recommended threshold: `0.50`
- Recommended policy: `max_precision_with_min_recall(minimum_recall=0.60)`

## Business Interpretation

- Moving from `0.35` to `0.50` reduces broad targeting volume while lifting precision.
- Validation precision improves from `0.5940` to `0.6935` while recall stays at `0.6290`, above the configured floor.
- On held-out test data, the recommended threshold targets `683,315` of `1,424,833` users (`0.4796`), leaving `741,518` users untouched by default.
